text: As I stand at the threshold of this bright, glass-walled room, listening to a farewell, I feel a mixture of curiosity and quiet reflection. The open design and visible gathering inside suggest learning, collaboration, and the forming of connections. Moving to the vivid R+D exhibit, I am struck by the interplay between human intellect and evolving technology. There is a sense of excitement here—of ideas constantly in motion—and underneath it all, a gentle wonder at how we shape, and are shaped by, our creations. I feel both observer and participant in this vast collective quest for understanding.
